---
title: "Figure 4k GO Dot Plot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
Input Excel file
This file contains DAVID/PANTHER pathway enrichment results used for Figure 4K.

Required sheet:
Dotplot_Data
Required columns:
Pathway
Enrichment_Score
Dot_Size
pvalue
Pathway = enriched pathway term
Enrichment_Score = pathway enrichment score used for x-axis
Dot_Size = number of genes/counts represented by dot size
pvalue = adjusted p-value or enrichment p-value used for dot color

df <- read_excel("path_to_input/Figure4K_Dotplot_Input.xlsx", sheet = "Dotplot_Data")
```

```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Pathway = factor(Pathway, levels = rev(Pathway)),
    pvalue = scales::rescale(Enrichment_Score, to = c(0.003, 0.0003))
  )
```

```{r}
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Enrichment_Score, y = Pathway)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Dot_Size, color = pvalue)) +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "red",
    high = "blue",
    name = "pvalue"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(1.5, 9),
    name = "Count",
    breaks = c(20, 40, 60, 80, 100, 120),
    labels = c("2", "4", "6", "8", "10", "12")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PT_BPD vs ALVEOLAR vs SACCULAR",
    x = "ENRICHMENT SCORE",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      color = "purple",
      size = 16
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "black", linetype = "dotted"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "left"
  )

p
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_4L_dotplot.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "Figure_4L_dotplot.pdf",
  plot = p,
  width = 7,
  height = 6
)
```
